description_long: This is a tall, amber-colored glass bottle with a black cap and a prominent front label reading 'Ron Viejo de Caldas Tradicional.' The bottle has a classic cylindrical shape with gently sloping shoulders and a long neck, typical of liquor bottles. The label is cream and gold with black and red text, featuring branding and product information in Spanish. The cap appears to be made of plastic or metal and is black with gold text. The bottle is filled with a dark liquid, likely rum, giving it a rich amber hue. There are no visible signs of damage or wear, and the surface appears smooth and glossy.
description: A tall, amber glass bottle with a black cap and a detailed cream and gold label reading 'Ron Viejo de Caldas Tradicional.' The bottle is filled with a dark liquid and has a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full label 'Ron Viejo de Caldas Tradicional' and the black cap with gold text.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the bottle's curvature and partial side of the label, with the cap and neck visible.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the label and cap clearly.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view, showing the back of the bottle and the edge of the label, with the cap and neck visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front label reads 'Ron Viejo de Caldas Tradicional' in black and red text on a cream and gold background, with additional smaller text below. The cap also has gold text on a black background.
